name: s.to
description: Plugin for SerienStream (s.to / serienstream.to) and AniWorld (aniworld.to). Browse series, seasons and movies, and play episodes from every available hoster and language.
author: ano-nym-ous

settings.name: Site type
settings.description: Which catalogue to browse. 'serie' = SerienStream (s.to / serienstream.to), 'anime' = AniWorld. This must match the Base URL below.

settings.name: Base URL
settings.description: The site domain to use. Pick a SerienStream domain together with 'serie', or aniworld.to together with 'anime'. Switch to a mirror here if the default domain is unavailable.
